title: Taxi Knin | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Knin: long-distance transfers to Šibenik (€95), Split Airport (€110) and Zadar Airport from the historic inland railway town. Fixed prices.
keywords: taxi knin, knin taxi, knin train station taxi, knin airport transfer, knin to split airport, knin to sibenik, knin fortress taxi

schema.name: Taxi Knin
schema.description: Private fixed-price long-distance taxi from Knin, a historic inland railway town, to Šibenik, Split Airport and Zadar Airport.

mainEntity.name: Do you meet trains at Knin station?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I meet you on the platform or by the station exit, help with your bags and drive you straight on. Send me your train time when you book.
Yes, and agreed up front given the distance. Knin to Šibenik is €95, Split Airport €110 and Zadar Airport €140 per car for up to 4 passengers.

mainEntity.name: Can you do a return trip the same day?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I can wait or come back for you the same day. Tell me the timings and I will confirm a fixed price for the round trip.
